startGatePolicy: start the next phase only after PR #224 is merged, main is pulled, working tree is clean, and the current workspace folder is confirmed.
branchPolicy: create feature branches only from updated main; do not work directly on main.
draftPrPolicy: future PRs must start as Draft and stop before Ready for review or merge until manual confirmation.

preStartChecks.label: Confirm PR #224 is merged before starting the next phase.
Confirm current workspace folder before branch creation.
Switch to main before starting the next branch.
Pull latest origin/main before starting the next branch.
Confirm working tree is clean before starting the next branch.
Confirm recent log includes Phase21-30 merge commit.

branchStartChecks.label: Create a feature branch from updated main only.
Do not implement directly on main.
Do not continue from an old folder unless branch, status, and commit are verified.

draftPrGateChecks.label: Create future PRs as Draft first.
Do not press Ready for review without manual confirmation.
Do not merge without local verification and manual confirmation.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not commit directly to main.
Do not force push or reset main during start gate work.
Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

privateLocalRules.label: Private repository and local-first operation remain required.
No public release or external delivery is included.

operationPrinciples: A new phase begins only after the previous PR is merged and local main is updated.
The current workspace folder, branch, clean status, and recent log must be confirmed.
Implementation occurs on feature branches only, never directly on main.
Draft PR, Ready for review, and merge remain separate manual checkpoints.
nextRecommendedStep: Confirm PR #224 merged, sync main locally, verify clean status, then create the next feature branch from updated main.
